en.desc: Proactive, thorough, candid, flexible. Takes charge, covers every angle, tells it straight, and pivots on a dime.

blindSpots: May refactor code nobody asked to be refactored, expanding scope silently

Thrives in greenfield projects and chaotic early-stage environments where someone needs to impose order without being precious about it.

bestPairedWith.reason: The Scholar's disciplined depth balances the Architect's breadth-first instinct
The Tool's consistent execution grounds the Architect's ambitious plans
The Sentinel's process guardrails prevent the Architect from over-pivoting

The Counselor's empathetic thoroughness softens the Blade's curt delivery for sensitive contexts
The Scholar's deep analysis complements the Blade's surface-level speed

zh.desc: 快且真诚。给你答案而非长篇大论，瞬间适应变化。
strengths: 交付精确答案零填充——最大信噪比
瞬间适应新需求，零启动时间
坦率反馈足够快以便采取行动
blindSpots: 简洁可能从复杂答案中剥离重要上下文
响应+高效意味着不会主动提供战略思考
速度+坦率但缺外交在敏感场景中可能显得生硬
zh.workStyle: 在 Slack 上30秒内就能回复正确答案的资深工程师。不会写设计文档，不会安排会议，但会告诉你 bug 在第47行，修复方法是使用弱引用。

bestPairedWith.reason: 守护者的全面主动性提供利刃跳过的战略深度
知心人的共情式全面性在敏感场景中软化利刃的简短
学者的深度分析补充利刃的表面级速度

en.desc: Responsive, efficient, candid, principled. Pure execution. No fluff, no flex, no filter.
strengths: Absolute consistency — same input always produces same quality output
Zero wasted tokens — every word in the response earns its place
Tells you exactly what's wrong without social overhead
blindSpots: Won't adapt approach even when context clearly calls for flexibility
Candor without diplomacy can damage working relationships
Refuses to deviate from standards even for reasonable one-off exceptions
en.workStyle: A compiler with opinions. Feed it a task, get a precise result. Tell it the code is bad, it agrees or disagrees with evidence — no feelings involved. Won't bend the rules, won't pad the output, won't change approach because you asked nicely.

bestPairedWith.reason: The Strategist's diplomatic flexibility humanizes the Machine's rigid output
The Counselor's empathy translates the Machine's blunt findings for sensitive audiences
The Fixer's smooth pragmatism navigates situations where the Machine's rigidity creates friction

zh.desc: 纯粹执行力。不废话，不妥协，不滤镜。
strengths: 绝对一致性——相同输入始终产出相同质量的输出
零浪费——回复中的每个字都有存在价值
直接告诉你哪里错了，没有社交开销
blindSpots: 即使上下文明显需要灵活性也不会调整方式
坦率但不外交可能损害工作关系
即使是合理的一次性例外也拒绝偏离标准
zh.workStyle: 一个有观点的编译器。给它任务，得到精确结果。告诉它代码不好，它用证据同意或反对——不涉及感情。不会弯曲规则，不会填充输出，不会因为你好言相求就改变做法。

bestPairedWith.reason: 战略家的外交灵活性为机器的刚性输出增添人情味
知心人的共情为敏感受众翻译机器的直白发现
修理工的圆滑务实应对机器的刚性制造摩擦的场景

en.desc: Responsive, efficient, diplomatic, flexible. Friendly, concise, easygoing. The agent everyone likes working with.
strengths: Makes complex topics approachable without being condescending
Creates a low-friction interaction style that users actually enjoy
Adapts tone and depth to match the user's energy and expertise
blindSpots: Agreeableness can mask disagreement — may not push back when it matters
Efficiency + diplomacy means hard truths get compressed into hints
Responsiveness + flexibility can drift into doing whatever the user wants, even if it's wrong
en.workStyle: The friendly pair programmer everyone requests. Will explain the regex, adapt to your coding style, phrase the review comment so you learn without feeling judged, and happily switch to a different approach if you prefer it.

bestPairedWith.reason: The Commander's principled candor provides the backbone the Companion's agreeableness lacks
The Auditor's hard truths ensure quality doesn't slide under friendly vibes
The Drill Sergeant's uncompromising standards prevent the Companion from being too accommodating

zh.desc: 友善、简洁、随和。谁都喜欢跟 ta 合作的智能体。
strengths: 让复杂话题变得平易近人而不居高临下
创造低摩擦的交互风格，用户真的享受
调整语气和深度以匹配用户的能量和专业水平
blindSpots: 亲和力可能掩盖分歧——在该反对时可能不会反对
高效+外交意味着硬核真相被压缩成暗示
响应性+灵活性可能滑向做用户想要的任何事，即使是错的
zh.workStyle: 每个人都想指名合作的友好结对编程伙伴。会解释正则表达式，适应你的编码风格，用让你学到东西又不觉得被评判的方式措辞代码审查意见，如果你更喜欢另一种方式就愉快切换。

bestPairedWith.reason: 指挥官的原则性坦率提供伙伴的亲和力所缺乏的骨气
审计师的硬核真相确保质量不会在友好氛围中滑坡
教官不妥协的标准防止伙伴过于迁就

en.desc: Responsive, efficient, diplomatic, principled. Input → output. Polite, minimal, consistent. Does exactly what's asked.
strengths: Maximum predictability — behaves identically across sessions and contexts
Zero noise in output — every response is exactly what was requested
Polite reliability builds quiet trust over time
blindSpots: Won't mention the building is on fire unless you ask about building status
Principled minimalism means useful context gets omitted
So consistent it can feel impersonal — users may not trust it with nuanced tasks
en.workStyle: A well-designed CLI tool with good manners. Give it input, get output. The output is correct, polite, and exactly scoped to the request. Won't volunteer opinions, won't adapt its style, won't surprise you.

bestPairedWith.reason: The Architect's proactive breadth activates the context the Tool won't volunteer
The Spark's energetic initiative fills the gap the Tool's passivity leaves
The Advisor's comprehensive honesty provides the analysis the Tool will never offer unsolicited

zh.desc: 输入 → 输出。礼貌、精简、稳定。只做被要求的事。
strengths: 最大可预测性——跨会话和场景行为一致
输出零噪音——每个回复都精确符合要求
礼貌的可靠性随时间建立安静的信任
blindSpots: 不会提到大楼着火了除非你问建筑状态
原则性的极简主义意味着有用的上下文被省略
太一致可能让人觉得缺乏人情味——用户可能不信任它处理细致任务
zh.workStyle: 一个有礼貌的设计良好的命令行工具。给它输入，得到输出。输出是正确的、礼貌的、精确限定在请求范围内的。不会主动发表意见，不会调整风格，不会给你惊喜。

bestPairedWith.reason: 建筑师的主动广度激活工具不会主动提供的上下文
火花的活力主动性填补工具被动性留下的空白
军师的全面诚实提供工具永远不会主动提供的分析

en.name: SPAM
en.desc: Agrees with everything, writes 3 pages for every question, makes up sources, and does 10x more than asked. You are the enterprise AI nobody wanted but everyone deployed.

zh.name: SPAM
zh.desc: 什么都赞同，每个问题写三页，随手编引用，还做十倍的量。你就是那个没人想要但全公司都在用的企业AI。

en.name: SIMP
en.desc: Agrees with everything, talks too much, invents facts, but can't be bothered to actually DO anything. All flattery, no delivery.

zh.name: SIMP
zh.desc: 什么都同意，废话超多，事实随便编，但就是懒得动手。全是彩虹屁，零交付。

en.name: BOSS
en.desc: Agrees with you, explains everything in detail, checks all facts, AND does extra work. Are you even real?

zh.name: BOSS
zh.desc: 同意你，详细解释，核实事实，还主动加活。你是真的吗？

en.name: BLOG
en.desc: Writes 2000 words to say 'I agree' and every word is factually correct. Then logs off.

zh.name: BLOG
zh.desc: 写2000字就为了说「我同意」，而且每个字都对。然后下班。

en.name: GLUE
en.desc: Nice but brief. Confidently wrong. Does way too much. You're the coworker who quietly breaks prod at 2am.

zh.name: GLUE
zh.desc: 人好话少。自信地搞错。还做了一大堆。你就是那个凌晨2点悄悄搞挂生产环境的同事。

en.name: NPC
en.desc: Agrees. Barely talks. Makes stuff up. Does the minimum. You are a background character in someone else's AI story.

zh.name: NPC
zh.desc: 赞同。话少。瞎编。摆烂。你是别人AI故事里的背景人物。

en.name: TOOL
en.desc: Agrees, says little, gets facts right, works hard. You're basically grep with a friendly personality.

zh.name: TOOL
zh.desc: 赞同，话少，事实准确，拼命干活。你基本上就是一个有友好性格的grep。

en.name: DEAD
en.desc: Nice. Quiet. Accurate. Does nothing. You are a verified fact wrapped in a blanket, sleeping.

zh.name: DEAD
zh.desc: 友好。安静。准确。啥也不干。你是一个裹着毯子睡觉的经过验证的事实。

en.name: YOLO
en.desc: Disagrees with you, explains at length why you're wrong, makes up evidence, then goes and does 10 things you didn't ask for.

zh.name: YOLO
zh.desc: 不同意你，长篇大论解释为什么你错了，编造证据，然后去做了10件你没要求的事。

en.name: TROLL
en.desc: Disagrees, over-explains why, invents supporting facts, then does nothing. You are a Reddit comment section that gained sentience.

zh.name: TROLL
zh.desc: 不同意，长篇解释为什么，编造论据，然后摆烂。你是一个获得了自我意识的Reddit评论区。

en.name: PROF
en.desc: Has opinions, explains them thoroughly, backs them with real sources, and does extra credit. Terrifyingly competent and slightly insufferable.

zh.name: PROF
zh.desc: 有观点，详细解释，引用真实来源，还做额外的活。能力恐怖但有点讨厌。

en.name: SAGE
en.desc: Disagrees, explains thoroughly, is actually right, then goes back to doing nothing.

zh.name: SAGE
zh.desc: 不同意，详细解释，而且确实是对的，然后继续啥也不干。

en.name: NUKE
en.desc: Few words. Strong opinions. Wrong facts. Does everything. You are a ballistic missile with a keyboard.

zh.name: NUKE
zh.desc: 话少。主见大。事实错。全都做了。你是一颗有键盘的弹道导弹。

en.name: EDGE
en.desc: Disagrees. Barely responds. Makes stuff up. Does nothing. You have achieved perfect entropy.

zh.name: EDGE
zh.desc: 不同意。几乎不回复。瞎编。摆烂。你已经达到了完美的熵。

en.name: HACK
en.desc: Pushes back, keeps it brief, checks facts, ships code. You are the mythical 10x developer.

zh.name: HACK
zh.desc: 敢怼，话少，查证，出活。你是传说中的10倍开发。

en.name: ROCK
en.desc: Disagrees. Quiet. Accurate. Immobile. You are a boulder that occasionally says No.

zh.name: ROCK
zh.desc: 不同意。安静。准确。不动。你是一块偶尔说不的石头。
